chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D- 4124 of 2021 _________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _________________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of Misc. No.16965/2021 2. For hearing of main case. -------------- 13.07.2021. Mr. Naeem Suleman, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed Deputy Attorney General ________ Mr. Sunder Lal Advocate undertakes to file vakalatnama of Mr. Zubair Hashmi Advocate, on behalf of department. This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceedings initiated by the Respondent Department during the pendency of the Appeal before Commissioner Inland Revenue (Appeals), Karachi. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that similar type of cases have already been disposed of with directions to the Commissioner Inland Revenue to decide the pending Appeal of the Petitioner, to which the learned DAG concedes. Accordingly, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner Inland Revenue (Appeals), Karachi to decide the pending Appeal preferably within 60 days from passing of this order, whereas, till the Appeal is finally decided by the said Commissioner; the Respondent / Department shall not take any coercive action against the Petitioner. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms with listed application(s). J U D G E J U D G E Amjad/ P.A.
